    strongest = extensions[0]
    best = sum(1 for c in strongest if c.isupper()) - sum(1 for c in strongest if c.islower())
    for ext in extensions[1:]:
        s = sum(1 for c in ext if c.isupper()) - sum(1 for c in ext if c.islower())
        if s > best:
            best = s
            strongest = ext
    return class_name + '.' + strongest
